Elite Innovation Solutions — Internal Preview v12 · clickable prototype

Elite ERP — Design System

Design tokens, logo lockup, typography, and reference detail below — followed by the full interactive prototype where every module is clickable.

Mark usage

03 — Typography

Plus Jakarta Sans / IBM Plex Sans / IBM Plex Mono

Display · 800Elite ERP Dashboard
Display · 700Sales Invoice #INV-2031
Body · 400Create customers, track inventory, post journal entries, and manage employees — one place.
Body · 500 (UI label)Outstanding Receivables
Mono · tabular numsINV-2031 · SKU-00482 · SAR 12,480.50
06b — Detail — requested feature

Valid Till default — auto-calculate from Issue Date

Header row, close-up — the gear icon next to Valid Till Date opens this popover:
22 Jul, 2026
Default validity
Auto-calculate Valid Till from the Issue Date on every new quotation — no manual date picking.
Valid for
10
days after issue date
22 — Screen — v5 addition

States — page header pattern, empty state, loading skeleton

Quotations
Draft and send price quotes to clients
No quotations yet
Quotations you send to clients will show up here. Create your first one to get started.
Interactive prototype v12

Elite ERP — Click Everywhere

One persistent sidebar and topbar — click any nav item to navigate into that module, exactly like the real app. Presets, Account Reporting, and Business Settings have live sub-tabs; Invoice and Purchase Order each toggle between a fresh builder and a sent example. Use the switcher to jump to the pre-auth Login / Register screens.

elite-erp.app/dashboard

INNOVATION SOLUTIONS

Term 2: Prices are valid for the period stated above and are subject to change thereafter.
Term 3: Delivery timelines are estimates and may vary based on stock availability.

Group A — Standard Sales Terms
Default for: Quotation, Sales Order, Proforma Invoice
Term 1: Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry, standard since the 1500s.
Term 2: Prices are valid for the period stated above and are subject to change thereafter.
Term 3: Delivery timelines are estimates and may vary based on stock availability.
Add Term
Group B — Tax Invoice Terms
Default for: Invoice
Term 1: Payment is due in full within the payment terms stated on this invoice.
Term 2: A late payment fee of 2% per month applies to overdue balances.
Term 3: Goods remain the property of Aurora Fabrication Co. until payment is received in full.
Add Term
Group C — Purchase Terms
Default for: Purchase Order
Term 1: Goods must match the specifications and quantities stated on this purchase order.
Term 2: Vendor is responsible for delivery to the address stated above within the agreed timeframe.
Term 3: Any discrepancy must be reported within 48 hours of receipt.

Logo

Used on the sidebar, login screen, and every PDF document (invoices, quotations, purchase orders).

Current logo · aurora-logo.svg
Drop a new logo, or click to browse
PNG, JPG, or SVG · square aspect ratio recommended · up to 2 MB

Color Theme

Every org on Elite ERP can brand their own workspace. Pick a primary and accent color — every screen, chart, and button repaints to match, live.

Primary color
#1B1B4E
Accent color
#E87722

Updates instantly

Sent Featured

Default Terms & Conditions

Which Terms & Conditions Group is pre-filled on each document type when it's created. Manage the groups themselves under Preset Management → Terms & Conditions Groups.

Document TypeDefault Term Group
QuotationGroup A — Standard Sales Terms
Sales OrderGroup A — Standard Sales Terms
Proforma InvoiceGroup A — Standard Sales Terms
InvoiceGroup B — Tax Invoice Terms
Purchase OrderGroup C — Purchase Terms

Seal & Signature

Uploaded once here, reused automatically on every document's Seal & Signature block — no need to re-upload per document.

Company Seal
PNG or JPG · transparent background recommended
Authorized Signature
PNG or JPG · transparent background recommended

Print Layout

Controls the visual style of every downloadable PDF document — Quotation, Invoice, Purchase Order, and the rest.

Classic
Bordered table, tinted party boxes
Modern
Minimal rules, accent-only color
Minimal
Letterhead style, no fills
A4
Standard (20mm)

Default Bank Account

Pre-selected automatically on every new Payment Record and Purchase Order. Manage the full account list under Finance → Bank Accounts.

Cash on Hand
GL 1000 · Cash
Default
Al Rajhi — Operating
•••• 4471 · SAR

Fiscal Year

Controls the reporting period used across Account Reporting and payroll runs.

January
FY 2026 (Jan 1 – Dec 31, 2026)

VAT Configuration

Governs how VAT is applied and rounded across documents. Manage the actual rate presets under Preset Management → Tax Rates.

Registered
Exclusive of VAT
Round to nearest 0.01 (Halala)

ZATCA E-Invoicing

The connection this organization uses to comply with ZATCA Phase 1/2 e-invoicing. The QR code and hash shown on every Tax Invoice come from this integration.

Next step: once this direction is approved, these tokens, the sidebar/topbar chrome, the icon set (real lucide-react — already installed in the app), the card/chart/state/motion patterns, the router structure, and the new Business Settings (logo + per-org color theme, stored on the orgs table and applied at runtime via CSS custom-property overrides) get wired into the real Next.js app across every page.
